title: poa autumnalis var. robusta
intro: Poa autumnalis var. robusta, commonly known as the robust autumn bluegrass or robust poa, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and even exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Poa autumnalis var. robusta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application to treat various skin conditions.
